CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, string1 VARCHAR(255), string2 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT dameraulevenshtein(string1, string2, 4, 2, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE id=1;
SELECT id, dameraulevenshtein(string1, string2, 2, 3, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE distance < 5;
WITH distances AS (SELECT id, dameraulevenshtein(string1, string2, 1, 2, 3) AS distance FROM test_strings) SELECT * FROM distances WHERE distance = (SELECT MIN(distance) FROM distances);
SELECT d1.id, d2.id, dameraulevenshtein(d1.string1, d2.string2, 1, 1, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings d1, test_strings d2 WHERE d1.id != d2.id;
CREATE TABLE result AS SELECT id, dameraulevenshtein(string1, string2, 3, 2, 2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
SELECT MAX(distance) FROM result WHERE distance > 3;
